subtitles.text: When Mrs. McBing was in labour…
A pan appeared in the sky.

Turned left, and stopped
at the Beefball King.
It first arrived at the Market Building…
It flied over the railway, turned right…
And headed directly for the Bazaar.
At last coming into the maternity ward.

There, on the right hand side of
Mrs. McBing.

Mrs. McBing,
convinced that this was a miracle,

Please make him
a clever and smart boy!
The pan didn't seem to hear her words.
So Mrs. McBing amended her wish:
Or make him a smart businessman?

As handsome as Chow Yun Fat or
Tony Leung!

Her boy needed not to be
smart or handsome
As long as luck be with him!
It's nice to depend on oneself…

Of course Chow and Leung are
lucky guys…
But then they are smart too!

revisions.text: It flew along Garden Street…
revisions.note: Corrected 'flied' to 'flew'.

revisions.text:
Turned left, and stopped
at the Beef ball King.
revisions.note: Separated 'Beefball' into 'Beef ball' to correct the compound noun spelling.

revisions.text: Lingered a bit… Correction:
revisions.note: Added a space after the ellipsis before 'Correction:' for clarity and consistency.

revisions.text: It flew over the railway, turned right…
revisions.note: Corrected 'flied' to 'flew'.

revisions.text: It flew on…
revisions.note: Corrected 'flied' to 'flew'.

subtitles.text: Finally, the pan dropped to the floor…

Mrs. McBing,
believing her wish granted…
But what had the pan granted her?
A smart boy? A lucky boy?
Decided to name her son McNificient.
No! It's better to be humble!
I am the boy, no more McNificient…

revisions.text: To commemorate this, Mrs. McBing…
revisions.note: Removed the extra space before the ellipsis after 'McBing' for correct punctuation spacing.

subtitles.text: Yeah! The one at the junction… …
Right next to Silver City Food Mall.

Only 10 minutes walk from
the MTR Station!
With white teachers for English class!

revisions.text: Yeah! The one at the junction…
revisions.note: Removed the duplicated ellipsis to correct the punctuation.

revisions.text: Spring Flower offers white teachers!
revisions.note: Corrected verb agreement from 'offer' to 'offers' to match singular subject 'Spring Flower'.

subtitles.text: This piggy kid in a rabbit outfit…

Who doesn't look the least
like Chow or Leung…

The headmaster came from
the countryside…
As a result, he speaks with an accent.
Shall be replaced by the 98 Rule!
Shall be replaced by the 98 Rule!
We are sharing an important issue…

Children, have you handed in
the school fee?

You might conclude that
this is a shabby school.
But, for me and my mates…
This is the most beautiful paradise!

Who adores us in
her absent-minded way.
Also, she is a Faye Wong wannabe.
Miss Chan, I've been called twice!
Don't think that I've been daydreaming.
I mean, I ate 6 oranges that morning…
Then I ate 3 bananas this morning.
How are these two things related?

There are so many things that
I don't understand.
One day, when I finish kindergarten…
When I graduate from university, I know…
I will buy my mother a house!
Which we kids frequent after class.

- Fishball noodle, please.
- No noodle left.

- Fishball rice noodle then.
- No fishball left.

- Chicken wing noodle then.
- No noodle left.

- How about fishball congee?
- No fishball left.

- How about beef noodle?
- No noodle left.

- Fried chicken wing with fishball…
- No fishball left.
Hey, fishball and noodle are both gone…
You can't combine them with other things.

- A bowl of fishball then.
- No fishball left.

- A bowl of noodle?
- No noodle left.
you can probably tell how smart I am.
Nothing worried me, all things were fine.
No fishball left? Let's get some noodle.

revisions.text: Our headmaster runs a tea stand…
revisions.note: Corrected the misspelling 'teastand' to 'tea stand'.

revisions.text: Every day…
revisions.note: Corrected 'Everyday…' to 'Every day…' ('everyday' is an adjective; 'every day' is correct here).

subtitles.text: There is a song Miss Chan loves…
Which I always want to learn…
But it just comes out different.

You mean
“All Things Bright and Beautiful”?
Monday till Sunday… No pain no gain!
The middleaged swine is Mrs. McBing,

revisions.note: Added spaces after commas for correct number formatting.

revisions.text: The middle-aged swine is Mrs. McBing,
revisions.note: Corrected 'middleaged' to 'middle-aged'.

subtitles.text:
She works in insurance,
real estate and trading.

At the height of IT,
she even sets up her cooking site…
Today we're doing a simple dish,
Kids at home would love it.

Slowly, we tear the paper away
from the bun
Now we have a bun paper.
Turn the paper over like this…

revisions.text: Welcome to “Mrs. Mc Can Cook”.
revisions.note: Added a space after 'to' before the opening quotation mark.

subtitles.text: How time flies since last episode!
Now we shall do a Paper Bun.
The ingredient takes only a paper.
And we have a Paper Bun.

revisions.text: How time flies since the last episode!
revisions.note: Added 'the' before 'last episode' for correct phrasing.

revisions.text: The ingredient takes only a piece of paper.
revisions.note: Changed 'a paper' to 'a piece of paper' to correct the noun phrase.

subtitles.text: Chicken Bun Paper Bunning a Bun.

First, unwrap the chicken
from the paper.

Now we have a paper and
a piece of chicken.

Use the bun paper to wrap up
the chicken like this…
And then wrap it like this…

The delicious Chicken Bun Paper
Bunning a Bun!
See if the chicken is good!
Use the chicken bun to bun…
Then use the chicken bun paper to…
But my mother has her tender side.

Every night,
she tells me a story before sleep.
Once upon a time, a boy lied. One day…
Once upon a time, a boy studied hard.
He grew up and got rich.

Once upon a time, a boy was naughty.
One day…

Once upon a time, a boy slept a lot.
Next day…
That is my mother's direct approach.
Her love for me is direct.
Her expectation of me is direct.

But there are things that
simply cannot be gained.
You still think it's going happen?

The lottery numbers that
mother obliges to draw…
Failed even to bring her one cent!
I did try hard, but then…
But then, I still have dreams.
Maldives, a world outside our world.

The sky blue, clouds white,
the trees tall and water bright.
The colourful world of the tropical sea.
The primitive ocean of primitive energy.

Experience a world that
knows no boundary!
Enjoy a trip to your ideal world.
Mother, you know where Maldives is?
Mother will you take me there?
One day when I am rich.

They have Disneyland and
Hello Kitty Land.
Grandma and my uncles live there.

They have water sports and
shark's fin soup.
They have Fun World and Food Mall.
Their chicken rice fills you up.
They serve huge bowls of rice.
As for the place I most want to go, wow!

There, the sky is blue,
clouds white, the trees tall…
It is a world outside our world.

revisions.text: What's-its-name.
revisions.note: Corrected 'What's-it's name.' to 'What's-its-name.' to fix the possessive error and match the intended phrase.

subtitles.text: Take some medicine and he'll be fine.
Will he not what after the medicine?
Need he not what for the medicine?
No! I'll give him a shot.
How are you doing? Take the medicine.
I don't want the strawberry drink!
You won't get well without the medicine.

Sweetie, we will go to Maldives once
you get well.
I will book the ticket once you get well.

But you've taken everything edible
at home.
You see, the whole bottle was filled…
And I gulped it down bit by bit…
Now I am a good boy!
When are we going to Maldives?
You said we would go once I get well.

Maldives, where the trees tall and
water bright…
We'd go to Maldives once I get well.
I meant once I get rich.
No, that wasn't what you mean.
You said we'd go once I get well.
We will go next week, ok?

revisions.text: Those words have flair.
revisions.note: Corrected 'flare' to 'flair' (correct word for style or panache).

revisions.text: No, that wasn't what you meant.
revisions.note: Corrected 'mean' to 'meant' for correct tense.

revisions.text: We will go next week, OK?
revisions.note: Capitalized 'ok' to 'OK' for standard usage.

subtitles.text: The food on board is horrible?
We couldn't bring our own food, right?
Tell them I'm going to Maldives tomorrow.
Where the trees tall and water bright…
I need to pack now. Talk to you later.

Mother, do I need to bring
my birth certificate?
Mother, you keep it and don't lose it…
Leave on the morning, return at night.
Mother said that'd make things worthy.

The most beautiful day
in my childhood experience…

Do you think paper is
a good chicken wrapper?
If only for one small piece.

Has just won the first gold medal
in Hong Kong history!
San San, when confirmed her winning…

Help proves that
Hong Kong athletes are horrible…

Hong Kong athletes
are honourable athletes.

revisions.text: Excuse me, it should be “honourable”.
revisions.note: Added a space after 'be' before the opening quotation mark.

subtitles.text: And so, while one dream lingers on…
“aka: How Does a Calf Become a Calf?”
I know it is not easy.
I know it is not easy to find Logan.
I know it is not easy for him to take me in.
No matter how difficult this is…
I shall get an Olympic medal!

You raised San San,
now you will raise me!
When I receive my Olympic medal…
Cheung Chau, I finally make it here.
I must kiss this holy land!

Lamma Island?
Where Chow Yun Fat grew up?
I came into hiding on this island…
To stay away from the paparazzi.
And so many kids came to seek me out.
So I came to live here.
You want me to be your master?
You city kids are all spoiled…
You want to get an Olympic medal too?
How many hills must it travel…
How many seas must it pass…
How much pain must it bear…
Before a calf becomes a calf?
Whenever I sing this song, I need to pee.
Taking a pee first would not help.
But I must sing it now.
Logan will think better of me.
Logan looks strange after the song.
Or let me kneel here forever!
I tell mother what happened today.
But starts to defreeze a chicken.

At dinner,
mother offers 3 glasses of wine…

Oranges and the chicken to
the ancestral tablet.
Mother then tells me to kneel down.
We pay our respect to our ancestor.
As mother pours the wine on the floor…
She says in her solemn, tender voice:

learn with the master and
honour the ancestor.

revisions.text: But starts to defrost a chicken.
revisions.note: Corrected 'defreeze' to 'defrost', which is the correct verb for thawing food.

subtitles.text:
In honour of my master,
mother throws a banquet.
As I am the last disciple of the master…
I have a nice thick back.
San San is in training and couldn't come.
All my mates are there too…

Bringing school report,
medals and big buns.
They hope Logan will take them in also.
After the soup, the ceremony begins.

Mother pours a cup of tea and
I offer it to the master.
After all the hardship looking for Logan…

Now I can windsurf together with
San San!
I offer the tea to Logan…

He drinks the tea and
becomes my master.

And everyone from
Cheung Chau applauds.

In my life, I have two skills that
I'm proud of.
That I have passed onto San San.

The other, I shall pass onto
my new disciple…
what a marvelous skill that is!
Can you tell us what skill is that?
Is a unique Cheung Chau tradition.
Each year, in the forth month,
Set up 3 stacks of bun to celebrate.
A stack of bun is a stack of many buns!
Each stack coming up to 6, 7 storeys.
Bun snatching is to snatch those buns!
hundreds of youth would rush up…

The higher the bun you snatch,
the more blessed you are.
And the more praises you get.

In 1978, 2 stacks tumbled down,
hurting many.
And the unique tradition is lost.

revisions.text: Each year, in the fourth month,
revisions.note: Corrected 'forth' to 'fourth' (the ordinal number for the month).

subtitles.text:
The Olympic medal…
it has slipped away.

Every Saturday,
I'd take a ferry to Cheung Chau…

A game with no medal,
no competitor, no competition…
A game with no bun to snatch!
All I do is to go to the master's home…

Makes me forget all these weeks'
hard work.
So San San leaves without seeing me.
In despair, I crawl up the shelf.
I have had a lot of things said to me…

revisions.text: But “San yourself”…
revisions.note: Added a space between 'But' and the opening quotation mark for correct spacing.

subtitles.text:
Today is the first time
I sit down with Logan.
Dull… he's not a bad student.
Logan then proceeds to tell me a lot…
His ambition, his expectation of Dull.
He says he'll teach all he knows to Dull.

The more he talks,
the more excited he gets.

He tells me windsurfing
is not his strongest.
His strongest is really bun snatching…

He says bun snatching is
his lifelong achievement.
This calf… so thick, so strong!
How many hills must it travel…
How many seas must it pass…
How much pain must it bear…
Before a calf becomes a calf?
Your son, he will get this calf.
I have no idea why would Dull need…
But, looking at those steely veins…
I am reminded of Dull's pa, Bing.

The electronic dictionary
cannot be found.
So mother has been using the dictionary?
But why is she writing in English?

Mother must have translated it
word by word.

I use the machine to turn it back
into Chinese.

It is addressed to
the Olympic Committee Chairman.
“We Hong Kong people here love bun.”
it is important to snatch buns."

“One needs energy,
and many night congee.”
“Let athletes all over the world snatch!”

“One day,
I can see him snatching buns…”

“That is the biggest comfort
a mother can get.”

“Let the world know
the talent of your children.”
“That is why I write you this sudden letter.”

“Although you don't know
humble things like me.”
“But my boy is big, very big.”
“One day, you will know him too.”

revisions.text: “Dear friend,
revisions.note: Changed the opening straight quote to a left double quote.

revisions.text: it is important to snatch buns.”
revisions.note: Changed the closing straight quote to a right double quote.

subtitles.text: I go back to Cheung Chau to practice.
I don't know why I want to snatch a bun.

And I don't think it will ever become
an Olympic item.
Master thinks my crawling has passed.

Now I'll learn the
“12 Bun Snatching Hands”.
Was much admired by Butcher Lin!

Butcher Lin was a disciple of
the great Kung Fu king.
I don't know much about Kung Fu kings…
But I must be the ultimate pork…
My mind boggles as I practice, after all…
I am not a fan of bun snatching.
I am only doing this for mother.
Step by step, claw by claw…

I make it pass
the“12 Bun Snatching Hands”.

revisions.text: was much admired by Butcher Lin!
revisions.note: Changed capital 'W' in 'Was' to lowercase for correct sentence case continuation.

revisions.text:
I make it past
the “12 Bun Snatching Hands”.
revisions.note: Corrected 'pass' to 'past' for correct usage in context; added a space after 'the' before the opening quotation mark.

subtitles.text:
“There is no deformity,
but saves us from a dream”
Dull the big guy, not Dull the boy.

The two Dulls have different voices,
and then…

Dull the boy's world is still filled
with fantasy…
On and on, he became Dull the big guy.
But I shall tell more about Dull the boy.
Dull the boy hoped a lot.
He hoped there WAS a Santa Claus.
And he hoped to eat a Christmas turkey.
Right, I haven't eaten any turkey then.
Like stars falling from the sky…
Each slice of meat looks purer than snow.

Who float around the aromatic and
holy dish…
Floating in the Christmas night, floating…

All this about turkey was
only my imagination.
I had never eaten a turkey.
I had never even smelt one.
Mother claimed turkey was too big.
The two of us would never finish it.

One Christmas we celebrated with
roast duck.

Another year,
she bought a mini-oven at 60% off…
We would go shopping for a turkey.
On the way home, with turkey in hand…
That was the happiest moment in my life.

Following mother,
with salt on both hands…
I rubbed the turkey's thick chest.
I cried: the turkey's stomach won't stop!

We managed to stuff the turkey
into the oven.

Rising smoke stirred the stars with
a crunchy smell.
It was like early blessing from the angels.
Mother and me sat at the seafront.

revisions.text: Mother and I sat at the seafront.
revisions.note: Replaced 'me' with 'I' for correct grammar: 'Mother and I sat at the seafront.'

subtitles.text: I had never tasted anything so strong.

Cup noodles or roast duck
were not as strong.

The taste embedded
every single taste bud…
I woke up late the next day.

The sweetness was still there
after washing.
As we had a late breakfast…
There was only corn soup for lunch.
That night finally came the long awaited…

Slices of meat,
accompanied by guard and potato…

It was an exciting,
satisfactory moment for us.
What was left of the turkey was sliced…
With me helping out at times.
It was not easy to get rid of…
Fried noodle with sliced turkey, yummy.

Steaming chestnut bowl with
sliced turkey.

I shouldn't have said anything about
the turkey's stomach.

Came Dragon Boat Festival,
when I dug into the dumpling…
And found more pieces of turkey…

When mother finally disposed of
the turkey…
It was already half year later.

My beautiful dream ended with
my nightmare.
A serving turkey needs only be raised…
The time the turkey spent with us…
Was in fact longer than its life.
Taking the first bite is all it matters.

Afterwards,
it is just“be over and done with it”.
I could not come up with any profundity.
Did come up again a couple of times.
Once, it was at my wedding.
It was at my mother's cremation.

That day, I was looking at
the smoke rising up.

Suddenly, the smell of
the turkey returned.

I regretted I made mother
threw the turkey away.

revisions.text:
Slices of meat,
accompanied by gourd and potato…
revisions.note: Corrected 'guard' to 'gourd', which fits the food context.

revisions.text: were dressed with soy sauce.
revisions.note: Lowercased 'Were' to 'were' to continue the sentence from the previous line.

revisions.text: with me helping out at times.
revisions.note: Lowercased 'With' to 'with' to continue the sentence from the previous line.

revisions.text: Turkey pâté with bread.
revisions.note: Corrected 'pete' to 'pâté', the correct word for a turkey spread.

revisions.text: It was already half a year later.
revisions.note: Inserted 'a' in 'half a year' for correct expression.

revisions.text: A serving turkey needs only to be raised…
revisions.note: Inserted 'to' in 'needs only to be raised' for correct grammar.

revisions.text: for a few months.
revisions.note: Lowercased 'For' to 'for' to continue the sentence from the previous line.

revisions.text: was in fact longer than its life.
revisions.note: Lowercased 'Was' to 'was' to continue the sentence from the previous line.

revisions.text: taking the first bite is all that matters.
revisions.note: Lowercased 'Taking' to continue the sentence and inserted 'that' for correct idiom 'all that matters.'

revisions.text:
Afterwards,
it is just “be over and done with it”.
revisions.note: Inserted a space before the opening quotation mark for proper spacing.

revisions.text:
I regretted I made mother
throw the turkey away.
revisions.note: Changed 'threw' to 'throw' to match the infinitive form after 'made.'

subtitles.text:
Olympic medal winner San San Li
will compete again…
To prove to the world that…
HK will apply to host the Asian Games.

Response from
all sides has been enthusiastic.

Among them,
the Bamboo Game Association…
Is proposing Mahjong for official game.

As for the Cold Cut and
Roasting Association…

“Duck Hanging”
would make an ideal addition.

More interesting,
CIC Insurance is joining force with…

revisions.text: “Special Report”
revisions.note: Corrected quotation marks.

revisions.text: is proposing Mahjong for official game.
revisions.note: Lowercased 'Is' to continue the sentence from the previous line.

revisions.text: To campaign for “Tart Throwing”.
revisions.note: Added a space between 'for' and the opening quote, and corrected the opening quote style.

subtitles.text:
“Tart Throwing”
was chosen as the highlight.
“HK, One Big Tart” was a logical choice.

And the hosting right of
the Asian Games…

Went to a place Hong Kong people
have never heard of.

Went back to where
they used to throw their tarts.

In secondary school,
I stopped practicing the 12 hands.
Sometimes, when I went out with mother…
I'd still snatch a bun for her.
Carts were replaced by ordering sheet.

revisions.text: Carts were replaced by ordering sheets.
revisions.note: Changed 'ordering sheet' to 'ordering sheets' for correct plural form.

subtitles.text:
At times, I'd go to Cheung Chau
for barbecue.
They'd changed to snatch plastic buns.

revisions.text: For environmental reasons…
revisions.note: Changed 'reason' to 'reasons' for correct usage in this context.

subtitles.text:
On Cheung Chau
was a Cheung Po Tsai Cave.

Where legend claimed
the pirate hid his treasure.
As I was the one who could crawl…

My mates said I should take a look and
maybe get rich.

So I crawled along the dark and
narrow cave.
There was nothing but a box.
Inside, there was an unfinished bun.
Maybe the pirate didn't get to finish it.

“Excelled 6 sets of steps
when I was young…”

“Brought up San San
when I am old! Still…”
Bun in hand, I suddenly realized…
There are things that cannot be forced.
No fishball, no noodle, no Maldives…
And the pirate took no bite.
Bun in hand, I suddenly thought…
Growing up, facing this sordid world…
This not so dreamy, not so funny world…

revisions.text: “Eating 1½lb white bread last night…”
revisions.note: Removed the extra space before the closing quotation mark for consistency.

subtitles.text: Right, I am McDull the big guy.
With a pair of really thick calves.
I got bored one time and stared at it…
No guarantee that one would make it.

You see, smart guys like me
don't really know…

How to make a lesson out of
his own story.
When the wind blows, I'd think…
If mother could see me like this…
I've come up with a lesson!

Mother got inspired after
her dot com failed.
That way, you have a roast chicken.
There was a remark in the cookbook:
If you want a delicious chicken…
A chicken that wouldn't upset you…
The secret is: please, roast it well!

revisions.text: The last recipe was “Roast Chicken”.
revisions.note: Added a space between 'was' and the opening quotation mark for correct spacing.

subtitles.text: But you said Regular is gone!

Regular sure is gone.
How about the Special?
But you said the Special is gone.

The Special sure is gone.
Try Quickie. It's the same.

This is too much!
Is there anything we can eat here?
The Regular is gone. Isn't that fantastic?
Try our Supper. It's all the same.

I'm not having supper
under board daylight!

What's in a name?
It's the same as Lunch.

Great! Whatever you say!
And make it quick!
You want it quick? Try Quickie!

revisions.text:
I'm not having supper
under broad daylight!
revisions.note: Corrected 'board daylight' to 'broad daylight'.
